name: hnh-tv
description: HnH TV - Full Stack MERN Application

scripts.install-all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm --prefix backend run dev" "cd frontend && npm start" "cd backend/root && python3 -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend build not required for Node.js'
